Beginning at a point in the centerline of Old State Road; thence N 22°00'00" E, 300.00 feet; thence along a curve to the right having a radius of 250.00 feet, an arc length of 75.00 feet, a tangent of 38.00 feet, and a chord bearing N 30°35'00" E, 74.85 feet; thence N 39°10'00" E, 200.00 feet; thence S 50°50'00" E, 410.00 feet to the point of beginning.
